test_cases.name: create_author_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful creation of an author with valid data

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verify that missing required field 'name' returns validation error

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_born_year
test_cases.description: Verify that born_year outside valid range (0-2026) returns validation error

test_cases.name: list_authors_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful retrieval of authors list with pagination

test_cases.name: list_authors_with_skip_and_limit
test_cases.description: Verify pagination works correctly with skip and limit parameters

test_cases.name: get_author_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful retrieval of author details

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verify that requesting non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verify that If-None-Match header with matching ETag returns 304

test_cases.name: update_author_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful update of author details

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verify that If-Match header with mismatched ETag returns 412

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books_fails
test_cases.description: Verify that deleting author with associated books returns 409

test_cases.name: create_book_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful creation of a book with valid data

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify that duplicate ISBN returns 409 conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_price
test_cases.description: Verify that negative price returns validation error

test_cases.name: list_books_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful retrieval of books list with pagination

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verify filtering by author_id, category_id, and price range works

test_cases.name: get_book_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful retrieval of book details

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that requesting soft-deleted book returns 410

test_cases.name: update_book_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful update of book details

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful soft deletion of a book

test_cases.name: restore_book_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful restoration of a soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that restoring non-deleted book returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful application of discount to eligible book

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verify that discount on book published within last year returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_rate_limit_exceeded
test_cases.description: Verify that exceeding rate limit (5 req/10s) returns 429

test_cases.name: update_stock_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful stock update with valid quantity

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Verify that negative stock result returns 400

test_cases.name: create_review_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful creation of a book review

test_cases.name: list_reviews_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful retrieval of book reviews

test_cases.name: get_book_rating_happy_path
test_cases.description: Verify successful retrieval of book average rating
